title: Spawn Biome Conditions
description: Defines the conditions under which an entity can spawn, including biome filters, brightness, height, and herd settings.

tokens.text: has density limits for population control

fields.title: Spawns In Lava
fields.description: Indicates the entity can spawn in lava.

fields.title: Disallow Spawns In Bubble
fields.description: Prevents spawning inside bubble columns.

Filters allow data objects to specify test criteria which allows their use. Filters can be defined by a single object of type (Filter Test), an array of tests, collection groups, or a combination of these objects.
fields.note: This uses the Minecraft filter dataType (20) which properly handles the complex filter structure including string operators and values.

fields.title: Domain
fields.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

fields.title: Operator
fields.description: The comparison to apply with 'value'.

fields.title: Subject
fields.description: The subject of this filter test.

fields.title: Test
fields.description: The name of the test to apply.

fields.title: Value
fields.description: The value being compared with the test.

fields.title: All Of
fields.description: All of these tests must pass.

fields.title: Any Of
fields.description: Any of these tests must pass.

fields.title: None Of
fields.description: None of these tests must pass.

fields.title: Spawns On Block Filter
fields.description: Specifies blocks on which this entity can spawn. Can be a single block name string, an array of block objects with name property, or an array of strings representing block names.

alternates.description: An array of block name strings

fields.title: Spawns On Block Prevented Filter
fields.description: Specifies blocks on which this entity cannot spawn. Can be an array of block name strings.

fields.title: Herd
fields.description: Specifies herd spawning configuration. Can be a single herd object or an array of herd objects.

fields.title: Permute Type
fields.description: Specifies permutation types for spawning. Can be a single object or an array of permutation objects.

fields.title: Brightness Filter
fields.description: Restricts spawning based on light level. Hostile mobs typically spawn in darkness (0-7), passive mobs in brighter areas.

fields.title: Delay Filter
fields.description: Delays entity spawning by a configurable time after conditions are met. Useful for cooldowns after mob deaths.

fields.title: Density Limit
fields.description: Limits how many of this entity can exist in an area, with separate caps for surface and underground. Set -1 for unlimited.

fields.title: Difficulty Filter
fields.description: Restricts spawning to specific difficulty levels (Peaceful, Easy, Normal, Hard).

fields.title: Distance Filter
fields.description: Controls spawning based on distance from the nearest player. Mobs typically spawn 24-128 blocks from players.

fields.title: Height Filter
fields.description: Restricts spawning to specific Y-coordinate ranges. Useful for depth-based mob distribution.

fields.title: Is Experimental
fields.description: Marks this spawn rule as experimental. Only active when the corresponding experiment toggle is enabled.

fields.title: Is Persistent
fields.description: When enabled, spawned entities will not despawn naturally. Used for mobs like villagers.

fields.title: Mob Event Filter
fields.description: Controls spawning based on whether a specific mob event (like raids or wandering traders) is active.

fields.title: Player In Village Filter
fields.description: Restricts spawning to when a player is near a village. Used for iron golems, cats, and raid mobs.

fields.title: Spawn Event
fields.description: Triggers a specific entity event when the mob spawns. Commonly used to initialize entity behavior.

fields.title: Spawns Above Block Filter
fields.description: Filters spawning based on blocks above the spawn point.

fields.title: Spawns On Surface
fields.description: When enabled, this entity can spawn on the world surface.

fields.title: Spawns Underground
fields.description: When enabled, this entity can spawn underground (below the surface).

fields.title: Spawns Underwater
fields.description: When enabled, this entity can spawn in water.

fields.title: Weight
fields.description: Relative spawn probability compared to other entities in the same biome. Higher values = more frequent spawns. 100 is typical for common mobs.

fields.title: World Age Filter
fields.description: Restricts spawning based on world age (in ticks). Useful for progressive difficulty where certain mobs appear later.
